edge_hypothesis: EMA trend alignment + RSI momentum confirmation + ATR volatility gate on ETH 4h targets the transitional regime — the regime with highest alpha (Vortex v3a trans PF=3.886). The triple-confirmation architecture reduces false entries during choppy consolidation. The ATR gate filters out low-volatility bars where moves lack follow-through, ensuring entries only fire when expansion energy is present. This tests whether the ema_rsi_atr template, which has never been tested at high R:R on ETH 4h, can produce ACCEPT-tier results with proper risk management. The key mechanism: RSI confirms directional commitment (not just EMA alignment) before capital is deployed, while ATR ensures the entry bar has enough range to sustain a move.

variants.label: EMA-RSI-ATR 8:1 standard
entry_long: EMA trend alignment confirms bullish structure
RSI_14 confirms momentum above neutral zone
ATR volatility gate ensures sufficient expansion energy
entry_short: EMA trend alignment confirms bearish structure
RSI_14 confirms momentum below neutral zone
ATR volatility gate ensures sufficient expansion energy
exit_rules: Exit on ATR TP hit (16.0x ATR)
Exit on ATR stop hit (2.0x ATR)
